name: Scope Creep Detector
description: Compares a new client message against an original project scope/SOW and flags each request as In Scope, Out of Scope, or Ambiguous — helping freelancers and consultants catch scope creep before it happens.
steps: API Request receives scopeText and newMessage
Generate Text node classifies each ask in newMessage against scopeText
API Response returns a structured JSON array of classifications
author: Czarina Mari Gonzales
